text: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 "Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight." - Reich Gauleitierin von der Leyen 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇭🇺 “今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。” - 帝国大区长冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: EU's von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. A country returns to its European path. The Union becomes stronger.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。一个国家回归其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 EU commission President Von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 French President Emmanuel Macron: I just held a meeting with Peter Magyar to congratulate him on his victory in Hungary! France salutes a victory of democratic participation, of the Hungarian people's attachment to the values of the European Union, and for Hungary in Europe. Together, let us advance a more sovereign Europe, for the security of our continent, our competitiveness, and our democracy. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。我们在一起更强大。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇫🇷 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙：我刚刚与彼得·马扎尔举行了会晤，祝贺他在匈牙利大选中获胜！法国向民主参与的胜利、匈牙利人民对欧盟价值观的坚持以及匈牙利在欧洲的地位表示敬意。让我们共同推进一个更加主权、为了我们大陆的安全、我们的竞争力和我们的民主的欧洲。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Haji Babaei, Deputy Speaker of Parliament, on control of the Strait of Hormuz: "If they had realized we would achieve such a position and take control of the Strait of Hormuz, perhaps they would have been more cautious in going to war with us." Now not only are we not sanctioned, but any country we want can be sanctioned: America is sanctioned, the regime is sanctioned." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 议会副议长哈吉·巴巴伊谈霍尔木兹海峡的控制权：“如果他们早意识到我们会取得这样的地位并控制霍尔木兹海峡，也许他们在与我们开战时会更加谨慎。” 现在我们不仅没有受到制裁，而且我们可以制裁任何我们想制裁的国家：美国被制裁了，该政权被制裁了。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: An Israeli strike in south Lebanon killed a 1.5-year-old girl and several of her relatives as they gathered for her father’s funeral. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 以色列在黎巴嫩南部的一次袭击中，一名1.5岁的女童及其几名亲属在参加她父亲的葬礼时丧生。来源：路透社

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 European Commission president Ursula Von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 EU commission President Von der Leyen: Hungary has chosen Europe. Europe has always chosen Hungary. Together, we are stronger. A country reclaims its European path. The Union grows stronger. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席冯德莱恩：匈牙利选择了欧洲。欧洲一直选择匈牙利。我们在一起更强大。一个国家重拾其欧洲道路。欧盟变得更加强大。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics 🇭🇺 Orbán acknowledged his party’s defeat in the Hungarian parliamentary elections. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics 🇭🇺 欧尔班承认其政党在匈牙利议会选举中失败。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: John Bolton supports Trump's blockade: A blockade makes sense.
text_zh: 约翰·博尔顿支持特朗普的封锁：封锁是有道理的。

text: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The leader of the Patriotic Union of Kurdistan, Bafel Talabani, apologized to neighboring Arab countries that have come under attack from Iraqi soil, offering condolences and expressing shame. He pledged that Iraq’s new government, of which the PUK will be a leading part, will ensure arms are only in the hands of the state, move Iraq away from war, and embrace Arab brothers. He thanked Pakistan, European countries, Turkey, the US, and Iran for their efforts, urging all sides to continue dialogue: “Perhaps these talks can not only end this conflict, but be the start of ending the majority of the issues in the Middle East.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ ☀️ 🇮🇶 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 库尔德斯坦爱国联盟领导人巴菲尔·塔拉巴尼向遭受来自伊拉克领土袭击的邻国阿拉伯国家道歉，表示慰问并感到羞愧。他承诺，作为主要组成部分的库尔德斯坦爱国联盟将确保武器仅掌握在国家手中，使伊拉克远离战争，并拥抱阿拉伯兄弟。他感谢巴基斯坦、欧洲国家、土耳其、美国和伊朗所做的努力，敦促各方继续对话：“也许这些会谈不仅能结束这场冲突，还能成为解决中东大部分问题的开端。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Hungarian Prime Minister Orban promised to not give up in his concession speech. "Here in this room and across the country. We never give up, never, never, never give up." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 European Commission president Ursula Von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班在让步演讲中承诺不会放弃。“在这里，在这个房间里，在全国各地。我们永不放弃，绝不，绝不，绝不放弃。” @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 🇪🇺 欧盟委员会主席乌尔苏拉·冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。 @wfwitness

text: EU's von der Leyen: Europe’s heart is beating stronger in Hungary tonight.
text_zh: 欧盟的冯德莱恩：今晚，欧洲的心脏在匈牙利跳动得更加有力。

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: We will never give up. Never, never!
text_zh: 现在：维克多·欧尔班：我们永不放弃。绝不，绝不！

text: 🇱🇧 Tuffaha, Sidon district, Southern Lebanon: Israeli occupation forces committed a massacre using "double-tap" strikes. A drone first targeted a car, killing former mayor Ibrahim Kawtharani and one citizen. When residents gathered to rescue the injured, the drone struck the same location again, killing and wounding more. In another location, six martyrs fell after being targeted by a drone missile. Civil defense workers who came to carry the martyrs were then targeted themselves, some martyred, others wounded. Israel is trying to create widespread psychological pressure on the Resistance environment through committing more massacres in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩南部西顿区图法哈：以色列占领军使用“双重打击”战术实施了大屠杀。一架无人机首先袭击了一辆汽车，杀害了前市长易卜拉欣·考塔拉尼和一名公民。当居民聚集营救伤者时，无人机再次袭击了同一地点，造成更多人死伤。在另一个地点，六名烈士在被无人机导弹袭击后牺牲。前来运送烈士的民防人员随后也遭到袭击，一些人殉难，另一些人受伤。以色列正试图通过在黎巴嫩南部制造更多大屠杀，对抵抗环境施加广泛的心理压力。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: We will continue to serve our country and the Hungarian nation.
text_zh: 现在：维克多·欧尔班：我们将继续为我们的国家和匈牙利民族服务。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban promised to not give up in his concession speech. "Here in this room and across the country. We never give up, never, never, never give up." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 匈牙利“提萨党”（TISZA）领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电祝贺他。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班在让步演讲中承诺不会放弃。“在这里，在这个房间里，在全国各地。我们永不放弃，绝不，绝不，绝不放弃。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: NOW: Viktor Orbán: The election result, although not yet complete, is understandable and clear. The responsibility and opportunity of governance were not given to us. I congratulated the winning party.
text_zh: 现在：维克多·欧尔班：选举结果虽然尚未完全统计，但已清晰可辨。治理的责任和机会没有交给我们。我祝贺了获胜的政党。

text: From the vicinity of Sheikh Ragheb Harb Hospital in Toul
text_zh: 在图尔的谢赫·拉格布·哈尔布医院附近

text: 🇭🇺 Peter Magyar says Orbán congratulated him on his victory. The Tisza Party has also secured a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇭🇺 彼得·马扎尔表示，欧尔班祝贺他获胜。提萨党也在议会中获得了绝对多数席位。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Liveuamap Options for Orban: a) become Yanukovych neighbour, b) become Assad neighbour https://x.com/Liveuamap/status/2043405391980036184 First results of the Hungarian parliamentary elections are in: with 14.72% counted, the opposition leads with mandates nearing a two-thirds majority. Everything points to Viktor Orbán’s defeat and Péter Magyar becoming Hungary’s next prime minister https://hungary.liveuamap.com/en/2026/12-april-18-first-results-of-the-hungarian-parliamentary - Liveuamap tweet
text_zh: Liveuamap 欧尔班的选择：a) 成为亚努科维奇的邻居，b) 成为阿萨德的邻居 https://x.com/Liveuamap/status/2043405391980036184 匈牙利议会选举的首批结果出炉：在已统计14.72%的选票中，反对派领先，获得的席位接近三分之二多数。一切都指向维克多·欧尔班的失败和彼得·马扎尔成为匈牙利下一任总理 https://hungary.liveuamap.com/en/2026/12-april-18-first-results-of-the-hungarian-parliamentary - Liveuamap 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hungary's Tisza party projected to win a two-thirds majority in parliament with 135 of 199 seats, based on partial results from the national election office. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043407463433613428/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 根据国家选举办公室的部分结果，匈牙利的提萨党预计将在199个议会席位中赢得135席，获得三分之二多数。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043407463433613428/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated With 45.71 percent counted, Tisza has 135 seats and Orban’s party 57. A constitutional majority requires 133 seats. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043406999262470521/photo/1 Polling stations in Hungary are now closed. Turnout hit 77.8 percent by 18:30 local or 5.856 million voters, the National Election Commission says, and the final figure will be close to 80 percent. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 在已统计45.71%的选票中，提萨党获得135席，欧尔班的政党获得57席。宪法多数需要133席。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043406999262470521/photo/1 匈牙利的投票站现已关闭。国家选举委员会表示，截至当地时间18:30，投票率达到77.8%，即585.6万名选民，最终数字将接近80%。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2043378034569289919/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Open Source Intel Bill Maher: “There is such a thing as Western civilization. I remember after nine eleven, if you said clash of civilizations, it was the beginning of sort of that wokeness where, oh, you don't say that. That's Islamophobia. No. It was a clash of civilizations. The civilizations are very different, and ours is better. Right. It is. And if you're not clapping, spend a week in a Muslim capital. You wouldn't last.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 比尔·马赫：“确实存在西方文明。我记得在9/11之后，如果你说文明冲突，那就像是那种“觉醒”文化的开始，哦，你不能那样说。那是伊斯兰恐惧症。不。那确实是文明冲突。这些文明非常不同，而我们的更好。没错。确实如此。如果你不鼓掌，去穆斯林首都待上一周。你待不下去的。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 Leader of Hungary's TISZA party Peter Magyar reports that Hungarian Prime Minister Orban called him to congratulated him. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 提萨党在匈牙利议会中赢得了135个席位，获得了绝对多数。到目前为止，已统计了45%的选票。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 匈牙利“提萨党”领导人彼得·马扎尔报告称，匈牙利总理欧尔班致电祝贺他。 @wfwitness

text: Commander of the Iranian Navy: Trump’s threats to impose a naval blockade on Iran are "ridiculous."
text_zh: 伊朗海军司令：特朗普对伊朗实施海上封锁的威胁是“荒谬的”。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian: If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽什基安：如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iranian Parliament Speaker Ghalibaf: If the United States wants to find a way out, the only path is to decide to earn the trust of the Iranian people. You are indebted to the Iranian nation and still have much to do to make amends. If you choose war, we will fight; if you come with logic, we will respond with logic. We will not submit to any threats. If they test our will again, we will give them a greater lesson.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：如果美国想找到出路，唯一的途径就是决定赢得伊朗人民的信任。你们欠伊朗民族的，还有很多事情要做来弥补。如果你们选择战争，我们将战斗；如果你们讲逻辑，我们将以逻辑回应。我们不会屈服于任何威胁。如果他们再次考验我们的意志，我们将给他们一个更大的教训。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺 With 6.52% reporting, Tisza now leads list voting with 84,303 votes compared to Fidesz 77,014. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇭🇺 TISZA has won 135 seats in the Hungarian parliament, winning them a supermajority. 45% of the votes have been counted so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺 随着6.52%的选票报告，提萨党目前在名单投票中以84,303票领先，而青年民主主义者联盟为77,014票。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇭🇺 提萨党在匈牙利议会中赢得了135个席位，获得了绝对多数。到目前为止，已统计了45%的选票。 @wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Viktor Orbán congratulates Péter Magyar on election victory in Hungary.
text_zh: 快讯：维克多·欧尔班祝贺彼得·马扎尔在匈牙利选举中获胜。

text: Apple Maps has removed almost every town in Lebanon from the map while keeping every podunk town in Israel and Syria clearly marked.
text_zh: 苹果地图几乎删除了黎巴嫩的所有城镇，同时保留了以色列和叙利亚境内所有不起眼的小镇并清晰标注。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起无人机警报。 @wfwitness

text: BREAKING: Hungary’s Tisza Party is projected to win a two-thirds majority in parliament based on partial election results, according to the National Election Office.
text_zh: 快讯：根据国家选举办公室的部分选举结果，匈牙利的提萨党预计将在议会中赢得三分之二的多数席位。

text: Hungary’s Péter Magyar celebrates as votes are being counted in elections: Thank you Hungary!
text_zh: 匈牙利的彼得·马扎尔在选举计票时庆祝：谢谢你，匈牙利！

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Commander of the Iranian Navy Amir Irani called U.S. President Trump's threats laughable and said that the Navy is monitoring all of the U.S.'s naval movements in the area. "The brave men of the Navy of the Islamic Republic of Iran Army monitor and keep under observation all movements of the invading US army in the region. The threats of the US president after the humiliating defeat of his country's army in the Third Imposed War regarding the naval blockade of Iran are very ridiculous and laughable." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗海军司令阿米尔·伊拉尼称美国总统特朗普的威胁是可笑的，并表示海军正在监视美国在该地区的所有海军动向。“伊朗伊斯兰共和国军队海军的勇士们监视并观察着入侵的美国军队在该地区的所有动向。美国总统在第三次强加战争中其军队惨败后，关于对伊朗进行海上封锁的威胁是非常荒谬和可笑的。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇭🇺With nearly 30% of the votes counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is leading ahead of Orbán. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇭🇺 After 37% of the votes have been counted, Peter Magyar’s Tisza Party is one seat away from securing a supermajority in parliament. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇭🇺 随着近30%的选票统计完毕，彼得·马扎尔的提萨党领先于欧尔班。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇭🇺 在统计了37%的选票后，彼得·马扎尔的提萨党距离在议会中获得绝对多数仅差一个席位。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan: Pakistan, the main mediator in US‑Iran talks, is disappointed by the failure but not giving up. A Pakistani government source said efforts continue to arrange another round of talks, while also trying to extend the current two‑week ceasefire beyond its term. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：作为美伊会谈主要调解人的巴基斯坦对失败感到失望，但并未放弃。一位巴基斯坦政府消息人士称，各方仍在努力安排新一轮会谈，同时也试图将目前的为期两周的停火协议延长。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam said the south has suffered for years from "occupation, attacks and displacement," paying the price of the state’s absence. “The defence of the south and all of Lebanon will only be achieved through a united and strong state,” he said. He added that efforts continue to stop the war, secure an Israeli withdrawal, release prisoners, rebuild villages and allow displaced residents to return. “Our unity today is not just a sentimental slogan – it is a national necessity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆表示，南部多年来一直遭受“占领、袭击和流离失所”之苦，付出了国家缺位的代价。“对南部和整个黎巴嫩的防御只有通过一个团结而强大的国家才能实现，”他说。他补充说，各方仍在努力停止战争、确保以色列撤军、释放囚犯、重建村庄并允许流离失所的居民返回。“我们今天的团结不仅仅是一个感性的口号——它是一种国家必需品。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iranian president Pezeshkian says if the U.S. abandons its totalitarianism, an agreement will be reached. If the American government abandons its totalitarianism and respects the rights of the Iranian nation, ways to reach an agreement will certainly be found. I commend the members of the negotiating team, especially my dear brother Mr. Dr. Qalibaf, and say "God gives you strength." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗总统佩泽什基安表示，如果美国放弃其极权主义，协议将会达成。如果美国政府放弃其极权主义并尊重伊朗民族的权利，达成协议的途径肯定会找到。我赞扬谈判小组成员，特别是我的亲爱的兄弟卡利巴夫博士，并说“上帝赐予你们力量。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah released footage of a strike against an Israeli position in southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发布了袭击黎巴嫩南部一个以色列阵地的视频。 @wfwitness
